question_text: Question 48: Let A be an n × n n × n real matrix. Which of the following statements is/are true?

options.A: If A is a symmetric matrix such that
options.C: If A is a symmetric matrix such that the singular values of A are all strictly positive, then A is positive definite.
options.D: If 1 is the only singular value of A, then A is orthogonal.
